title: P+1: Slide Intelligence Subsystem
purpose: Extract structured technical claims, methods, entities, and alignment signals from PDF/image slide decks.
golden_path_role: Produces slide intelligence packets that feed gap detection and working paper enrichment. Poor extraction here silently degrades all downstream reasoning.
upstream_dependencies: TODO: PDF extraction pipeline (external to this repo)
invariants: Every slide unit must have a non-empty title or content field.
Extracted claims must include a confidence score between 0.0 and 1.0.
Entity extraction must not produce duplicate entity names within the same slide unit.
Method names must be normalized to lowercase for consistent downstream matching.
known_edge_cases: Slides with only images and no text produce empty extraction (valid; must emit empty arrays, not null).
Slides with identical titles in different sections must be deduped by content hash.
Multi-column slide layouts may produce interleaved text requiring layout-aware parsing.
